title: Index Multiple Selection
summary: Feature parent for the shipped checkbox foundation and separately approved selection consumers.
content_html:
Index Multiple Selection

Purpose

Add explicit checkbox selection to the manage-mode index, then let deliberately designed batch actions consume that selection without changing the displayed document.

This is the feature parent. It does not act as an implementation tracker.

Feature Documents

  • Concept — desired interaction, product boundaries, and deferred choices.
  • Architecture — proposed state, ownership, action-target, drag/drop, and service boundaries.
  • Delivery — shipped checkbox-selection foundation, reload behavior, and acceptance evidence.
  • Consumer Assessment — candidate classification, provisional value-to-risk order, exclusions, and delivery gate.
  • Docs Viewer Roadmap — scheduling, dependencies, and suggested feature order.

Current State

The checkbox-selection foundation is complete. The manage tree exposes Select, a sibling checkbox gutter, Shift-range selection, a selected count, Clear, and Done. docs-viewer-index-selection.js independently owns checked ids, the range anchor, mode, and reload/lifecycle reconciliation; current actions still resolve the displayed or explicitly invoked document. Runtime Module Ownership records the shipped boundary.

No consumer is approved yet. Prepare package, Export selected, Move selected, and Delete selected have distinct value and blast-radius profiles, so each requires a separate delivery decision. Ordinary Import is not a plural consumer, and Returned packages remains a whole-package scope workflow with no index-selection input.
